exercises.name: Resistance band SA over head tricep ext
Resistance band SA row
exercises.description: Grip both handles to perform the row

exercises.name: Resistance Band Squat
exercises.description:
1) While standing, step on the middle of your resistance band with both feet flat on the floor. 

2) Grip both ends of your band. 

3) Slowly bend your knees and sit back into a squat position. 

4) Return to starting position.

exercises.name: Resistance band straight arm pull down
Rest
exercises.description: Rest. Focus on exhaling fully.

exercises.name: Reverse Burpee
exercises.description: From a standing position, roll backward onto your back, then roll forward into a squat and immediately jump explosively, repeating the movement continuously.

exercises.name: Reverse Chop With Sled
exercises.description:
1) When performing this exercise, you’ll want to have both hands in the single loop.

2) From there, get nice wide stunts laterally to the sled or sideways so that you can first drive from the hips and rotate through with the upper body.

3) Throughout the exercise, as best you can lock out your arms in front of you with a slight bend in the elbows.

exercises.name: Reverse Crunch
exercises.description:
1) Lie on the floor and bend your knees so they are at 90 degrees. 

2) Start by curling your hips off the floor and reach your legs up toward the ceiling. 

3) Pause, and slowly return to starting position.

exercises.name: Reverse Dislocates
exercises.description:
1.Stand upright holding a PVC pipe or wooden dowel behind you in a wide grip.

2.Raise arms, passing the PVC pipe overhead, rotate the shoulder until the pipe touches the hips. The wider the grip, the easier it is. The narrower the grip, the more intense the stretch.

3.Reverse the movement to return to starting position. 

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Reverse flies into tricep kick backs
Reverse Grip Cable Row | How To Perform Them Correctly
exercises.description: Reverse Grip Cable Row | How To Perform Them Correctly

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge
exercises.description:
1. Start standing with feet together and hands by your sides. 

2. Step one foot back, and slowly descend towards the floor while keeping an upright posture.

3. Push yourself back to a standing position using the front foot. 

4. Repeat on the other side.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge Bicep Curl
exercises.description:
Hold dumbbells at your sides. 

Step back into a lunge while performing a bicep curl. 

Return to start and switch sides.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge to Band Pull Apart
exercises.alternateName: Superband Reverse Lunge to Band Pull Apart
exercises.description:
Hold a superband with both hands in front of your chest, keeping tension in the band by maintaining a slight pull. 

Step one foot back into a reverse lunge, keeping your chest upright and core engaged. 

While in the lunge position, perform a band pull apart by extending your arms out to the sides, squeezing your shoulder blades together.

Return your arms to the starting position, push through your front heel to stand up, and repeat on the opposite leg.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge to Front Kick
exercises.description: Step backward into a reverse lunge, then drive the rear leg forward into a front kick, repeating the movement on the same side.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge to Jumping Knee Drive
exercises.description: Start by driving one knee up toward your chest, then step back into a reverse lunge with the same leg. As you push off to stand, jump and drive the same knee up again.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge to Rotation
exercises.description:
Stand tall with your feet hip-width apart and hands clasped in front of your chest. 

Step one leg backward into a reverse lunge, lowering your hips until both knees are bent at about 90 degrees. While in the lunge position, rotate your torso toward the side of your forward leg, keeping your core engaged and chest upright. 

Return your torso to the center, push through the front heel to stand back up, and repeat

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge to T-Rotation
exercises.description: Step back into a lunge, then rotate your torso toward the front leg, reaching one arm upward. Return to standing and switch sides.

exercises.name: Reverse Lunge with Straight Leg Kick
exercises.description:
1. When performing this exercise, ensure proper lunge form. Your lower body, most joint angles should be at roughly 90 degrees.

2. To start, initiate the movement by taking a step to the rear, allowing your hips and knees to flex to lower your body. 

3. Contacting the back leg through only the ball of the foot, descend until your knee nearly touches the ground.
 
4. After a brief pause, as you return to the standing position by driving through the heel of the front leg to extend the knees and hips, kick your leg forward. 

5. Then back to the starting position.

6. Repeat.

exercises.name: Reverse tricep push + reg tricep push
Reverse tricep push up into reg tricep push up
exercises.description: Keep shoulder blades low and arms close to your sides.

exercises.name: Ring Dips
exercises.description:
1. Start with your hands shoulder-width, in the support position, supporting your body weight with hands down by your side. 

2. Slowly lower your body by bending at the elbows and shoulders, slightly leaning forward.

3. Push yourself back up to the start position until your arms are fully extended.

exercises.name: Ring L-Sit
exercises.description:
1. Start in the support position on the rings, with hands down by your sides, supporting your body weight in the rings. 

2. With straight arms, slowly raise the legs with fully extended knees, until the legs are parallel with the floor. 

3. Hold this position for the desired time, then return to the start position.

exercises.name: Ring Muscle Ups
exercises.description:
1. Set the rings shoulder-width apart, and grip them with arms fully extended.

2. Start swinging, alternating between an arched back position, and a hollow body position (abs flexed, toes out in front of body)

3. When the toes are forward in the hollow position, pull your body up until the rings are at chest height.

4. Move your chest over top of the rings, keeping your hands and elbows close to your body. 

5. Press yourself all the way up until your arms are fully extended. Return to the start position.

exercises.name: Roman chair DB glute hyper extension
Roman Chair Side Bend
exercises.description:
1.Begin by standing up straight on your side, hands overhead, clasp together. 

2.Bend all the way down, full extension of the oblique. 

3.Turn up crunching. 

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Roman Chair with a Plate Twist
exercises.description:
1.Lean back with legs fully extended, hands holding the plate on each side, chest level.

2.Twist to the left.

3.Twist to the right.

4.Repeat.

exercises.name: Rope Climb
exercises.description:
1. Start standing with hands gripping a rope above your head. 

2. Raise your knees up towards your elbows, and wrap the rope between both of your feet.

3. Pull with your arms until you reach a standing position. Repeat.

exercises.name: Rope Hanging Knees to Elbows
exercises.description:
1. Start by gripping a rope with both hands above head height. 

2. Pull your knees up to touch your elbows, then slowly return to the start position. Repeat.

exercises.name: Rope Rows
exercises.description:
1. Start by standing next to a rope and grabbing it with both hands at chest height. 

2. Take one or two steps backwards, then lengthen your arms, rocking back onto your heels with arms outstretched. 

3. While keeping a tall body position, pull your body upwards towards the rope until it is next to your chest.

4. Slowly return to the start position and repeat.
